---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new prop, theme, behaviour, or integration
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem?

<!-- The user-facing problem this would solve. Not the solution. We design from the problem backwards. -->

## What you'd like to see

<!-- The proposed API / behaviour. A code snippet is the best possible description. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Workarounds you've already tried, or other API shapes that would also solve the problem. Helps us pick the best fit. -->

## Scope check

- Does this belong in the **library** (`src/lib/`) or in the **demo** (`src/App.vue`)?
- Would this break any of: existing themes, the 220 / 130 / 110 responsive states, the FAB persistence layer, the opt-in event bus, the `prefers-reduced-motion` posture, the bundle-size budget (~ 54 kB gzip)?
- If the answer is "yes" to any of the above, please explain how the breaking change is justified.

## Reference

<!-- Links to similar features in other libraries, design references, accessibility specs, etc. -->
